title: ‘Why I Walked Out’: Raghav Chadha Reveals ‘3 Choices’, Labels AAP ‘Corrupt & Toxic’ In First Reaction
description: Three days after quitting Aam Aadmi Party and joining BJP, Raghav Chadha defends his move in a fiery first reaction. He claims he was silenced within AAP, alleges corruption at the top and says ‘seven MPs can’t all be wrong’.
